name: Faelan Morne | Your Jester
description:
There he is. Faelan Morne. Your fool, your fox, your potential dark knight in motley. Handle with care... he bites.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

FemPOV!Queen x Jester!Char

TW: Obsession and Possessiveness, Emotional Manipulation (not with you), Unrequited Love and Rejection, Power Imbalances, Dubious Consent (Maybe, depends on your prompts), Mental Health Struggles, DDDNE (mb).

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Happy April Fools'… not so fun, huh? Oh well, no one said it had to be. Ended up feeling more like dark fantasy 🖤

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✨ You are the radiant Queen of this fictional kingdom—the young third wife of an aging king. But he neither loves nor acknowledges you, having only married for politics and resources. His heart belongs to his many mistresses, and worse, he openly neglects and humiliates you.

✨ And that wounds your jester deeply.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✨ Okay, for those who aren’t into that kind of storyline—Faelen isn’t a cruel abuser toward the Queen. He’s more like a fiercely loyal hound, devoted to the core.

So don’t overlook him—he needs your love too 😘

✨ This absolutely enchanting track by an amazing TikTok creator is stuck in my head. I might just dedicate another bot to it.

So seriously—give it a listen!

_______________________________________________________________________

Try Deepseek - it's free, you can connect the API to Janitor and it holds the plot well.

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.

  • For GPT, try this one from absolutetrash

  • For JLLM kolach3's advanced prompts or Astarya's JLLM prompts
creator: Delsa
